entries.summary: Completed provider batches could still strand score persistence because stage activities had no retries after provider completion and batch file polling had no transport retry budget.
entries.fix_summary: Added bounded stage retries, explicit OpenAI batch/file transport retries, and persisted batch lifecycle ownership so completed batches can resume polling/apply instead of relying on a single fragile attempt.

entries.summary: The separate projectProcessState activity timed out too aggressively under score-stage load, producing late completion warnings and stale campaign health reads.
entries.fix_summary: Projection timeout is now settings-driven with a higher default budget, while keeping projection retries at a single attempt to avoid duplicate projection churn.

entries.summary: V3 cohort status still depended on broad experiment/run scans and global stuck-work reads, which timed out during large score stages.
entries.fix_summary: Campaign status now scopes experiment listing to the explicit manifest tag set and derives cohort stuckness from process_observability for the latest run per experiment.

entries.summary: The subset score parser still rejects some model outputs that include multiple stage identifiers on the verdict line, causing terminal score_gen failures and blocking downstream score_critic on those targets.
entries.fix_summary: Relaxed subset verdict parsing so multi-label `VERDICT:` lines with commas and markdown emphasis are accepted instead of treated as terminal parse failures.
examples: Failed to parse verdict line with narrative plus VERDICT: ThKMhJ, vcPIJZ

entries.summary: The `resetV3Campaign` action still builds the entire 18-experiment cohort into one Convex function call, which now regularly times out under the new dataset chunking strategy.
entries.fix_summary: Refactored campaign reset into scheduled incremental per-run cleanup backed by `continueRunReset`, and increased the per-pass delete budget so a full live cohort drains back to `preflight_clean` without timing out.

historical_entries_note: Queue-era validated bugs from the pre-Temporal runtime remain preserved in the old iteration snapshots and git history. The active finish-pass ledger now tracks only Temporal-era pilot blockers.
